title: Adorn
body:
**Adorn** is a decoration and furniture mod that adds many decoration blocks, such as... - Chairs and sofas! You can sit and relax on them. A sofa is also a nice place for a nap. - Drawers! Smaller container than chests, but a fancier piece of furniture. - Stone torches! They're made of stone and are better light sources than wooden torches. - Kitchen blocks! You can decorate your kitchens with kitchen counters, cupboards and sinks (Perfect for kitchen sink modpacks!) - And more: tables, shelves, fences, chimneys... ## Requirements ### Fabric

### NeoForge *No special requirements.* ### Quilt - [Quilted Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) ![](https://i.imgur.com/owM5tUa.png) ## Mod compatibility Adorn includes special support for these mods: Mod | Fabric and Quilt | Forge and NeoForge | Features -|-|-|- [Architect's Palette][arpal] | ❌ | ✅ | Block variants [Biome Makeover][bmake] | ✅ | ✅ | Block variants [Biomes O' Plenty][bop] | ❌ | ✅ | Block variants [Blockus][blockus] | ✅ | ❌ | Block variants [BYG][byg] | ✅ | ✅ | Block variants [Cinderscapes][cind] | ✅ | ❌ | Block variants [DashLoader][dashl] | ✅ | ❌ | Support for Adorn's block states [Ecologics][ecol] | ❌ | ✅ | Block variants [EMI][emi] | ✅ | ✅ | Custom recipe features etc. [JEI][jei] | ✅ | ✅ | Custom recipe features etc. [LambDynamicLights][ldl] | ✅ | ❌ | Dynamic lighting for Adorn blocks [Lil Tater Reloaded][ltr] | ✅ | ❌ | Power taters [Mod Menu][modm] | ✅ | ❌ | Settings screen [Promenade][promenade] | ✅ | ❌ | Block variants [Roughly Enough Items (REI)][rei] | ✅ | ✅ | Custom recipe features etc. [Tech Reborn][tr] | ✅ | ❌ | Block variants [Terrestria][terr] | ✅ | ❌ | Block variants [Towelette][towel] | ✅ | ❌ | Fluidlogging for Adorn
